g.title: source_note
g.text: Fields borrow from raw scan output during resolution.

g.title: interface_note
g.text: wpa_cli interface_list, iw dev, ip link
Interface name borrows from raw interface output during resolution.

g.title: input_note
g.text: terminal, TUI, web, desktop, stdin, keypress
Selection input borrows from captured presentation input.

g.title: action_input_note
g.text: terminal menu, TUI item, web button, desktop action, CLI command
Domain defines the minimal borrowed input shape it accepts.
Presentation implementations adapt their source event to raw: &str.

g.title: status_note
g.text: Status fields borrow from raw status output during resolution.

g.title: secret_input_note
g.text: terminal secret prompt, TUI, web, desktop, stdin
Password input borrows from captured presentation input.
Secret input should not be logged or rendered back by default.

g.title: saved_network_note
g.text: Saved network fields borrow from raw saved network output.
network_id is used to connect without reading the saved secret.

g.title: saved_secret_note
g.text: wpa_supplicant config file when wpa_cli hides the secret
secret_kind may be password, psk_hex, hidden, or unknown.
Secret should not be logged or rendered unless explicitly requested.
